creator: matsuo.hiroshi.39@gmail.com
text:
I tried your patch and confirm it works well.  Please close this bug report.

By the way I feel that IPOIB_CM link speed of 13-RC3 is slower than that of 
12-RELEASE.  But I have no evidence, only in my memory before upgrade.
If I find something worth reporting I will send-pr another topic.

Thank you.
